response: Start by replacing sugary drinks with water or herbal tea to reduce your intake immediately. You should also swap processed snacks for fresh fruits like [fruit name] to satisfy cravings naturally. Reading nutrition labels carefully will help you identify hidden sugars in [product type]. Incorporating more fiber-rich foods into your meals can stabilize blood sugar levels effectively. Planning your meals ahead of time ensures you have healthy options ready when hunger strikes. Gradually reducing sugar allows your taste buds to adjust without feeling deprived. Consistency is key, so keep a food diary to track your progress and stay motivated.
